task_title: Split Environment into PartialEnvironment and BaseEnvironment
problem_statement: Vite’s node-side `Environment` class in `packages/vite/src/node/environment.ts` bundles shared fields (name, config, options, logger) together with plugin resolution (`plugins`, internal `_plugins`, init flags). Several code paths—such as plugin transforms invoked with a minimal context, external configuration checks, and the internal id resolver—only need config/options and a per-environment logger, not a fully initialized plugin list. Refactor so that: (1) a `PartialEnvironment` holds name, config, options, and the existing per-environment logger behavior; (2) a `BaseEnvironment` extends it and owns `plugins` and the internal state needed for lazy plugin access; (3) concrete environments (`DevEnvironment`, `BuildEnvironment`, `ScanEnvironment`, and any compatibility shim) extend the appropriate base; (4) the public `Environment` type stays a union of those concrete classes and `cachedByEnvironment` continues to work; (5) call sites that do not need plugins use `PartialEnvironment` (or the correct narrower type) instead of casting or pretending a full environment exists. Preserve existing runtime behavior for dev, build, scan, HMR, and plugin containers.
hints: Primary new module: `packages/vite/src/node/baseEnvironment.ts` (`PartialEnvironment`, `BaseEnvironment`, `FutureCompatEnvironment`). Slim `packages/vite/src/node/environment.ts` to the `Environment` union plus `cachedByEnvironment`. Update subclasses in `packages/vite/src/node/server/environment.ts` (`DevEnvironment`), `packages/vite/src/node/build.ts` (`BuildEnvironment`), `packages/vite/src/node/optimizer/scan.ts` (`ScanEnvironment`) to extend `BaseEnvironment` and align `init()` idempotency with the renamed internal initialized flag. Touch `packages/vite/src/node/external.ts` (`createIsConfiguredAsExternal`), `packages/vite/src/node/plugin.ts`, `packages/vite/src/node/plugins/css.ts`, `packages/vite/src/node/plugins/asset.ts`, `packages/vite/src/node/plugins/dynamicImportVars.ts`, `packages/vite/src/node/server/hmr.ts`, `packages/vite/src/node/server/pluginContainer.ts`, `packages/vite/src/node/cli.ts`, `packages/vite/src/node/config.ts`, `packages/vite/src/node/index.ts`, and especially `packages/vite/src/node/idResolver.ts` (`PartialEnvironment` + `createEnvironmentPluginContainer` usage). Logger tag color selection should sum character codes (e.g. with `reduce`), not coerce an array with `Number(...)`. Tests under `packages/vite/src/node/__tests__/` construct `PartialEnvironment` for transforms—match that API.
